message:
Simplify provider method signatures

Move provider-specific options to the end of adapter method
signatures so they can use optional parameters instead of a
middle positional value typed as undefined.

This keeps the call pattern smaller and easier to read while
preserving the existing provider behavior and test coverage.

files.patch:

         apiKey: "literal-key",
